overview.description: The ClearShares OCIO ETF (OCIO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Broad Market index. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that seeks to outperform a 60/40 blended benchmark by over or under weighting across a broad range of asset classes. OCIO was launched on Jun 27, 2017 and is issued by ClearShares.
infoTable: ICE BofA US Broad Market Index
